raw_title: Spaces of Unmoderated Hate? The Legitimization of Anti-Immigration Narratives on Right-Wing Alternative Media
title_en: Spaces of Unmoderated Hate? The Legitimization of Anti-Immigration Narratives on Right-Wing Alternative Media
title_zh: Spaces of Unmoderated Hate? The Legitimization of Anti-Immigration Narratives on Right-Wing Alternative Media
plain_summary_en: This paper studies Spaces of Unmoderated Hate? The Legitimization of Anti-Immigration Narratives on Right-Wing Alternative Media. In plain terms, it asks what is happening, why it matters for public communication, and what evidence the authors use. The likely focus is Narrative, Identity (music), Discourse analysis, Alternative media. The abstract suggests a mixed methods approach, which makes the work useful for understanding how communication changes in everyday life.
plain_summary_zh: This paper studies Spaces of Unmoderated Hate? The Legitimization of Anti-Immigration Narratives on Right-Wing Alternative Media. In plain terms, it asks what is happening, why it matters for public communication, and what evidence the authors use. The likely focus is Narrative, Identity (music), Discourse analysis, Alternative media. The abstract suggests a mixed methods approach, which makes the work useful for understanding how communication changes in everyday life.
research_direction_en: The paper points to an active research direction around Narrative, Identity (music), Discourse analysis, Alternative media, especially how institutions, platforms, and audiences shape communication outcomes.
research_direction_zh: The paper points to an active research direction around Narrative, Identity (music), Discourse analysis, Alternative media, especially how institutions, platforms, and audiences shape communication outcomes.
